{{Quote|I cannot even shut down my engines, and cannot change course. To the tar pits of Alurion with you, Ackdool. You promised sanctuary.|Nom Anor, to Commander Ackdool|<ref name="VP" />}}
'''Alurion''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]]. The world was covered in vast tar pits. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Raioballo sector lay along the initial invasion path of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] resulting in their conquest of many of the worlds. Cut off from Republic assistance, Alurion sat behind enemy lines until the end of the war.

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Alurion was created for the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', published in [[1999]]. It was later listed as an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1stm}}
